## 🛠️ Type of Change
<!-- Check all boxes that apply: -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🌟 New feature (non-breaking change which adds an analytical metric or UI card)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing data schemas to change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update

## ✅ Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style and architectural conventions of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in complex PySpark / SQL aggregations
- [ ] I have verified that any new endpoints or schema changes run successfully locally
